name: Regular Wand
description: Clean professional system. Full semantic layer stack — backgrounds, surfaces, borders, fills, text. Swap the seed colors and ship.

colors.name: Brand/Neutral
colors.description: Neutral gray for surfaces and text

colors.name: Brand/Accent
colors.description: Accent — violet for highlights and CTAs

name: TW Pro
description: Full system. Direct mode, global brand constants + alpha tints, 3 themes. Per-role semantic variation groups for Surface, Text, Status, Outline, and Inverse.

name: TW Funk
description: Maximum chroma at every contrast level. High-energy variation names, 3 vivid themes. Built for bold creative products.

name: TW Native
description: Token Wand's native system. Palette (7 colors) → Role (what the color does) → Variation (state within that role). Path: Brand/button/hover, Neutral/text/base, Danger/fill/disabled.

description: TW Native in direct mode. Same palette → role → variation architecture but tokens are solved straight from the seed color — richer, more saturated. No tonal ramp collection.

name: TEST-01 Scale Baseline
description: Scale mode · Natural algo · 11 steps · contrast mapping · global variations · 2 themes · alpha tints · descriptions on · scale collection on

roles.name: text
roles.description: Body text AA→AAA

roles.name: fill
roles.description: Interactive fills

roles.name: role-natural
roles.description: solver=natural — default perceptual solver

roles.name: role-saturated
roles.description: solver=saturated — maximises chroma while hitting contrast

roles.name: role-luminance
roles.description: solver=luminance — adjusts lightness only, preserves hue+chroma

roles.name: role-hue-locked
roles.description: solver=hue-locked — never shifts hue angle

roles.name: role-chroma-max
roles.description: solver=chroma-maximized — pushes chroma to gamut limit

name: TEST-03 localBg Hex
description: localBg.kind="hex" · value={Light:"#E5E7EB", Dark:"#1F2937"} · on-surface role contrast is vs explicit hex not page bg · companion role has no localBg for comparison

roles.name: text-page
roles.description: Contrast vs page bg · no localBg · baseline comparison

roles.name: text-on-surface
roles.description: Contrast vs #E5E7EB (Light) / #1F2937 (Dark) — card surface hex localBg

name: TEST-04 localBg Color
description: localBg.kind="color" · value="Sand" (named color in palette) · _resolveLocalBg maps to { light: sand.value, dark: sand.value } · same bg hex for all themes · role on-sand contrast vs Sand hex

roles.name: text-base
roles.description: Text vs page bg · no localBg · baseline

roles.name: text-on-sand
roles.description: Text on Sand surface · localBg.kind=color, value="Sand" → same hex (#A8956A) for all themes

name: TEST-05 localBg Token (Fixed)
description: localBg.kind="token", dynamic=false · value="Blue/fill/default" → localBgTokenRef set · two-pass engine: resolveTokenRefBgs() resolves token per theme · on/fill contrast vs fill/default hex

roles.name: fill
roles.description: Fill role — produces Blue/fill/default which on/fill references

roles.name: on/fill
roles.description: on/fill · localBg.kind=token, dynamic=false · ref "Blue-fill-1" = fill/default · two-pass resolves per theme

name: TEST-06 localBg Token (Dynamic)
description: localBg.kind="token", dynamic=true · value="[color]/fill/default" → localBgDynamicRef set · resolveTokenRefBgs replaces [color] per color → localBgPerColor · Blue on/fill vs Blue fill/default, Red on/fill vs Red fill/default

roles.name: fill
roles.description: Fill role — Blue/fill/default and Red/fill/default are resolved as localBg

roles.name: on/fill
roles.description: on/fill · localBg.kind=token, dynamic=true · "[color]-fill-1" placeholder → per-color localBgPerColor

name: TEST-07 scopedColorIds
description: 3 colors · 3 roles: (A) scopedColorIds=null → all colors; (B) scopedColorIds=[] → no colors; (C) scopedColorIds=["t07-c2"] → Green only · exercises scope filtering in engine

roles.name: text-all
roles.description: scopedColorIds=null → all 3 colors get tokens

roles.name: text-none
roles.description: scopedColorIds=[] → zero token output

roles.name: text-green-only
roles.description: scopedColorIds=["t07-c2"] → Green only

name: TEST-08 Index Mapping
description: mappingMethod="index" · indexTargets=[2] picks step 2 · indexTargets=[8] picks step 8 · contrast-mapped companion role for comparison · scale mode

roles.name: indexed
roles.description: mappingMethod=index · picks scale steps at indices 2, 5, 8

roles.name: contrast
roles.description: mappingMethod=contrast · finds closest step meeting contrast target

name: TEST-09 Custom Variations
description: perRoleVariationOverride=true · role A: customVariationList=true, 3 custom variations (bg/fill/text) · role B: customVariationList=false, uses global 5 variations · same color, different variation counts

roles.name: status
roles.description: customVariationList=true · 3 variations: bg, fill, text

roles.name: text
roles.description: customVariationList=false · uses 5 global variations

name: TEST-10 All Shorthands
description: useShorthandColors/Roles/Variations/Steps all=true · tokenNameSegments=["role","color","variation"] (role-first ordering) · scaleStepNames with shorthand map · all token names use short labels

roles.name: background
roles.description: Shorthand: bg

roles.name: text
roles.description: Shorthand: tx

name: TEST-11 Named Scale Steps
description: scaleStepNames: 7 named steps (50→900 T-shirt) with shorthands (xs→3xl) · useShorthandSteps=true · scaleLength=7 · tests _parseStepNames + _parseStepShorthands in translateConfig

roles.name: text
roles.description: Text using named + shorthand step labels

name: TEST-12 Scale Algorithms
description: algorithmScopeLevel="color" · 7 colors × 7 algorithms: Natural / Uniform / Expressive / Symmetric / OKLCH / Material / Linear · each color independently uses a different scale generation algorithm

roles.name: text
roles.description: Single variation to show algorithm difference clearly

name: TEST-13 Themes & Grouping
description: 3 themes (Light, Dark, Brand) + 1 duplicate "Light" → deduped to "Light 2" · tokenGrouping="role" → role-keyed output · custom collection names · exercises _deduplicateThemeNames

roles.name: text
roles.description: Text across 3 themes + 1 deduped

name: TEST-14 Source Colors + Alpha
description: includeSourceColors=true · sourceCollectionName="palette/raw" · includeAlphaTints=true · alphaValues="5,10,20,30,50,75,90" (7 values) · 3 brand colors → 7 alpha opacity variants each in source collection

roles.name: text
roles.description: Semantic text tokens alongside source constants

name: TEST-15 Minimal
description: 1 color · 1 role · 1 variation · 1 theme · all optional features off · default names · no shorthands · no alpha · no source colors · no step names · minimum viable config

name: Material Design 3
description: Role = color family. Variations = M3 token slots. Figma folders mirror M3's hierarchy. Contrast calibrated per slot use case.

name: Radix UI
description: Radix's 12-step semantic scale. Role = purpose layer (background, element, border, solid, text). Variation = named slot within that layer. Matches Radix Themes and shadcn/ui token namespace.

name: Apple HIG
description: iOS/macOS adaptive semantic colors. Role = Apple color family (label, fill, background, separator). Variation = tier (primary → quaternary). Fixed system color primitives in a separate collection.

name: Blank Slate
description: The fastest start. Two colors, three roles, five named variations. Swap the seed colors and you have a working system in under a minute.
